text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin's signature racewear has arrived.
Her cool, street-style outfit does a great job of
accentuating her natural sharpness.
choice_data_list:
Good thing you let them know what kind of
design you wanted.

Good thing you let them know what kind of
design you wanted.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Well, duh. It's not like I'd wear clothes that don't
look good on me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: And I still feel the same since that time.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Taishin, Taishin, Taishiiin! Is it true you're getting your own signature racewear?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
All your hard work's paying off! I'm so happy for
youuu!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh, can it! I told you guys not to yell!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Well, this is cause for celebration. Such
high emotions are only to be expected.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What kind of design do you have in mind for it?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I looked through some magazines, and it seems
that these are popular lately.

The page she shows us features bright,
eye-catching costumes and cute garments that
would be perfect for concert performances.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I hate all of those. They're not my style.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Forget those. I want something more like what I
usually wear.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! But it's your signature racewear! Are you
sure you don't want something really awesome
with a lotta oomph?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I don't wanna wear anything gaudy or be some
loser who has to depend on her racewear to win.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm good enough as I am, and I don't need
anything other than my own strength to be a
better racer.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I see. And you want your signature racewear to
reflect that, yes? I quite like that logic, Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I sorta got caught up in the moment and
exaggerated a little, but none of what I said was a
lie.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm not gonna cater to anyone, nor am I gonna
rely on some fabric... I'll win my races all on my
own!
choice_data_list: You can lean on me, though.
You can lean on me, though.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm not gonna cater to anyone, nor am I gonna
rely on some fabric... I'll win my races all on my
own!
choice_data_list: You can lean on me, though.
You can lean on me, though.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hmph. Thanks, Captain Obvious.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I've finally reached a point where people's eyes
are on me...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
And I'm gonna keep rising up to the very peak of
the Twinkle Series!
choice_data_list: Yeah! And I'll be with you all the way!
Yeah! And I'll be with you all the way!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Um, don't get ahead of yourself.

Since Narita Taishin wants to run and it's the
perfect chance to break in her outfit, we head
over to the training track.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hup, hup, hup...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Taishin sure is amazing today, isn't she? It's like
her signature racewear boosted her intensity or
something.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! It's impossible to tear my eyes away from
her!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: That so?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Good! I'll steal everyone's attention and devour
them whole!)

And so, the starting shot signaling Narita Taishin's
resurgence blazes into the sky with a roaring
bang.

I tell Narita Taishin that trainers like myself exist
to support and help her get stronger.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Urk...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh. I guess I will if I'm in the mood. But I'm not looking to get chummy or anything.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna get stronger through my will alone. You
support me as you see fit.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: That's all there is to it, right?
choice_data_list: I'm fine with that. Let's get stronger—together.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Yup.

She gives me a noncommittal nod... But still, she
acknowledges me as her trainer, and that's good
enough for me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hey, what are you grinning about? Get weird with
me, and I'll kick you to the moon!

There's still a lot of work to do, and I don't
necessarily have Narita Taishin's full trust yet...

But we've sworn in our hearts to keep moving
forward the only way we can.
